EXPLORE.TITLE: Explore
EXPLORE.TEXT: Immerse yourself in a curated catalog ranging from eternal classics to the most disruptive contemporary voices.

LOCATE.TITLE: Locate
LOCATE.TEXT: Your next reading corner awaits. Find locations equipped with the latest technology in an environment of total serenity.

RESERVE.TITLE: Reserve
RESERVE.TEXT: Personalized experiences tailored to you. Reserve private reading spaces and exclusive events with a single touch.

CONNECT.TITLE: Connect
CONNECT.TEXT: Reading is not solitary. Be part of a dynamic intellectual ecosystem where ideas flow freely.

WHO.SUBTITLE: Who We Are
WHO.TITLE: BeBook
WHO.TEXT_1: At the heart of every volume lies a story waiting to be rediscovered. BeBook was born from the dream of preserving ancestral wisdom in a fast-paced world, creating a sanctuary where time seems to stand still.
WHO.TEXT_2: We are not just a library; we are curators of intellectual experiences. From ancient scrolls to the most cutting-edge digital formats, BeBook is the bridge between yesterday and tomorrow.

EVENT_1.TITLE: Classic Poetry Night
EVENT_1.DESC: A reading under the stars with the most influential verses of Hispanic literature.

EVENT_2.TITLE: Workshop: Handcrafted Bookbinding
EVENT_2.DESC: Learn millenary techniques to preserve knowledge in its purest form.

EVENT_3.TITLE: Symposium: Digital Future of the Book
EVENT_3.DESC: Global experts debate the convergence between paper and artificial intelligence.

FOOTER.DESC: Redefining the sanctuary of reading. We merge the elegance of the past with the innovation of the future to create an unprecedented literary experience.

DESCRIPTIONS.PRODUCT_DESC: This {{type}} offers a unique perspective on {{category}}. Ideal for those looking to deepen their knowledge with a {{adj}} approach.

SUPPORT.TITLE: Support
SUPPORT.SUBTITLE: Sanctuary of Silence
SUPPORT.HELP_PROMPT: In which corner of the sanctuary can we help you?

DISPONIBILIDAD: Our catalog expands weekly with new curated acquisitions.
If a literary treasure doesn't appear, it might be undergoing digital restoration.
The availability of physical copies varies depending on the selected branch.
FORMATOS: We offer high-fidelity ePub and PDF formats for an immersive reading experience.
Each digital work includes a layer of exclusive Sanctuary annotations.
You can access your readings from any device synced with your account.
PAGOS: We accept all major cards and digital payment methods on the market.
We maintain a policy of absolute transparency in our intellectual rates.
There are special memberships that grant free access to large sections of the catalog.

PROXIMOS: The cultural agenda is updated monthly with symposia and night readings.
We are preparing a series of workshops on manuscript preservation.
Check the Events section to discover upcoming star-lit evenings.
INSCRIPCIONES: Spots are limited to preserve the atmosphere of intimacy and reflection.
You will receive a unique access code in your institutional email after booking.
Cancellations must be made 24 hours in advance to release the space.
SUGERENCIAS: We deeply value the proposals from our intellectual community.
Do you have an author or theme in mind for our next dialogue?
All suggestions are evaluated by our curation committee.

CUENTA: You can personalize your literary identity from the settings panel.
Make sure to keep your institutional email updated for VIP notifications.
The security of your access key is our top technical priority.
TECNICO: We are constantly optimizing the digital sanctuary for your fluidity.
If you experience slowness, try clearing your browser's logs.
Our engineering team monitors the system in real-time 24 hours a day.
PRIVACIDAD: Your data is protected under the highest encryption standards.
At BeBook, the anonymity of your reading preferences is a sacred right.
We never share your information with entities outside our reserve.

SOBRE: We are a sanctuary dedicated to the preservation and dissemination of knowledge.
Our mission is to unite the elegance of the past with the technology of the future.
We were born in 2024 with the vision of creating an unprecedented reading space.
MEMBRESIAS: BeBook memberships offer exclusive benefits at all our locations.
From early access to invitations to private gala events.
There are different levels adapted to your pace of literary immersion.
VIP: Our VIP locations feature private reading rooms and curation services.
Located in environments of total serenity for complete concentration.
You can book exclusive appointments through our interactive map.
